$description: Zorn Colour Harmony Studio — Design Tokens (DTCG 2025.10)

$extensions.rings: T100–T900 (tints toward Titanium White #F5F5EF) · Base · S100–S900 (shades toward Ivory Black #231F1A)

color.$description: 24-pigment extended wheel, 19 tonal rings per colour

anchor.$description: Fixed anchor colours — mixing targets for tints and shades

zorn.$description: Semantic palette aliases for traditional and theoretical Zorn palettes

warm.$description: Traditional Zorn warm palette — achievable mix arc of Vermilion + Yellow Ochre + Titanium White + Ivory Black (0°–120°)

cool.$description: Theoretical Zorn cool palette — achievable mix arc of Prussian Blue + Alizarin + Indigo + Titanium White + Ivory Black (210°–345°). Anchored on #2D5FA0 → Slate, #9B1A30 → Alizarin, #3E5360 → Indigo.

theme.$description: UI semantic tokens. Use these in component design. Two sets: dark (default) and light.
